info.title: Polpo API
info.description: REST API for Polpo — an AI agent that manages teams of AI coding agents. Manage tasks, missions, agents, templates, skills, notifications, and approvals. For conversational interaction, use the OpenAI-compatible POST /v1/chat/completions endpoint.

bearerAuth.description: API key passed as a Bearer token. Configure via the apiKeys field in polpo.json or the POLPO_API_KEY environment variable.

post.description: Polpo's primary conversational interface. Send messages in OpenAI format, receive responses in OpenAI format. Polpo runs its full 37-tool agentic loop internally — you describe what you need, Polpo handles the rest. Supports streaming (SSE) and non-streaming modes.

role.description: Message role. System messages are appended as additional context (Polpo has its own system prompt).

content.description: Message content — plain string or array of content parts (text / image_url)

stream.description: If true, returns an SSE stream of OpenAI-format chunks. If false, returns a complete response.

model.description: Ignored. Polpo uses its configured orchestrator model.

200.description: Chat completion response (non-streaming). When stream=true, returns text/event-stream with OpenAI-format chunks ending with data: [DONE].

400.description: Invalid request (missing messages or no project available)

post.summary: Queue a draft task (transition draft → pending)

404.description: Checkpoint not found or not active

get.summary: Get activity history for a task

delete.summary: Remove a skill from the pool

post.summary: Assign a skill to an agent
Unassign a skill from an agent
Install orchestrator skills from a source

409.description: Already resolved or max rejections reached

404.description: Invalid/expired code or gateway not configured

post.summary: Link two peer identities across channels

post.description: Save credentials to the encrypted vault store. Credentials are encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM) and never logged or persisted in chat history.

get.summary: List vault entries for an agent
get.description: Returns metadata (service name, type, label, credential key names) without any secret values.

200.description: Vault entries metadata for the agent

get.description: Returns per-provider auth health: config key, env var, OAuth profiles (metadata only — tokens never exposed), cooldown/billing status.

List files and subdirectories at the given path. Path is sandboxed to the .polpo/ directory and the project working directory. Returns entries with name, type (file/directory), size, mimeType, and modifiedAt.

schema.description: Directory path to list. Defaults to the project root.

parameters.description: Directory path to list. Defaults to the project root.
parameters.name: path

200.description: Directory listing with path and entries array

get.description: Returns structured preview metadata for a file. For text files, includes the file content (optionally truncated). For binary files (images, audio, video, PDF), returns a URL to stream the content via the /files/read endpoint. Response includes: path, name, mimeType, size, previewable (boolean), type (text|image|pdf|audio|video|binary), url, and optionally content and truncated for text files.

schema.description: Maximum lines to return for text files (default: 500)

parameters.description: Maximum lines to return for text files (default: 500)
parameters.name: maxLines

get.summary: Get log entries for a session
